title: Experiencing site freezes when opening integration feature in an app in dev center
excerpt:
Recently I have been experiencing a browser freeze, and Javascript timeout when opening an integration feature in an app. This isn’t consistent but its recurrent. 
This is bad enough it takes out every monday.com related…

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml:
Recently I have been experiencing a browser freeze, and Javascript timeout when opening an integration feature in an app. This isn’t consistent but its recurrent.

This is bad enough it takes out every monday.com related tab I have open across windows. So something is getting triggered that is creating a global event that is affecting all monday.com windows.

Has anyone else experienced something similar?

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @anon29275264,

I have not heard about it but if you haven’t yet, please send us an email and we will take a look!

Cheers,
Matias

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml: I will as soon as I can get a console dump of when it happens. Was just seeing if anyone else had experienced it too so I could rule out anything local.
